alert.title: API Error Rate Spike — Patient Service
alert.description: Error rate on patient-service API increased from baseline 0.5% to 15.3% over the last 20 minutes. Majority of errors are HTTP 503 (Service Unavailable) on /api/v2/patients/lookup endpoint. P95 latency increased from 200ms to 4.2 seconds. 3 of 8 pods are in CrashLoopBackOff.

context.deployment_change: Added Redis caching layer for lookup endpoint
context.redis_status: Redis cluster patient-cache-prod showing connection timeouts
context.downstream_impact: Clinical Portal showing 'Patient not found' errors for some lookups
